title: tfc kaolinite killer
description: can't find kaolinite? I'll help you.
body:
have already traveled around the world, but still have not found kaolinite? there is a solution. this mod adds an alternative recipe for fire clay.
First you need to make bricks. Then crush the bricks with a mill or crushing wheel into fireclay dust. And finally, mix 8 fireclay dust and regular clay.![recipe of crushing brick into fireclay dust with mill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b978a22e5dd08537d7241e50efdaa16cd07d2d01.png)![recipe of fire clay. mix 8 fireclay dust with clay in workbench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f00fe146e8cd5a9899cc01f8638ae22507b1bdb6.png)
